name: DocuWare Document Management API
what_it_does: DocuWare enterprise content management REST API for document capture, workflow automation, and document archiving. Enables AI agents to manage document capture and ingestion from multiple sources for enterprise document management, handle AP invoice processing and approval workflow for accounts payable automation, access document search and retrieval from DocuWare file cabinets for intelligent document access, retrieve workflow routing and approval automation for business process management, manage document archiving and retention schedule management for compliance documentation, handle HR document management and employee file automation for HR operations, access document stamping and indexing for automated document classification, retrieve digital signature and approval workflow for contract execution, manage document distribution and delivery automation for document dispatch workflow, and integrate DocuWare with SAP, Microsoft Dynamics, Sage, and ERP systems for unified document-to-ERP workflow.
use_cases: Processing invoices from AP automation agents
Routing approvals from document workflow agents
Archiving compliance documents from records management agents
Managing HR files from employee records agents
not_for: Simple file storage without business process workflow
Consumer document management without enterprise process
Engineering CAD/BIM without enterprise content management
best_when: An SMB or mid-market business wanting AI agents to automate AP invoice processing, document approval workflows, HR document management, and compliance archiving integrated with SAP, Microsoft Dynamics, or similar ERP.
avoid_when: GDPR DATA RETENTION AND DELETION: Automated DocuWare document archiving must implement GDPR data subject deletion and retention policy compliance; automated archiving without retention rules creates GDPR violation for EU customer documents. SOX INTERNAL CONTROLS: Automated AP workflow and approval routing for SOX-covered entities must maintain segregation of duties and approval audit trail; automated approval bypass or approval chain shortcut creates SOX internal control deficiency. HIPAA DOCUMENT ARCHIVING: Healthcare patient documents archived in DocuWare require HIPAA Business Associate Agreement and security controls; automated PHI archiving without BAA creates HIPAA violation. Tax record retention: Automated document deletion must respect IRS and state tax authority document retention requirements (7 years for business records); automated deletion of tax-required records creates audit compliance risk.

auth.notes: DocuWare uses API key and OAuth 2.0. REST API with JSON. Germering, Germany HQ. Founded 1988. Acquired by Ricoh Company (2019). Ricoh subsidiary. Enterprise content management and workflow. 18,000+ customer organizations. 500,000+ users. SAP, Dynamics, and ERP integration. Competes with Laserfiche, M-Files, and Hyland (OnBase) for enterprise content management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-user annual subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user annual subscription; cloud and on-premise deployment
pricing.notes: Germering, Germany. Ricoh Company subsidiary (acquired 2019). Founded 1988. 18,000+ organizations. 500,000+ users. ECM and workflow specialist.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; large document processing may be async

known_agent_gotchas: GDPR RETENTION AND DELETION AUTOMATION: Automated DocuWare archiving must implement GDPR-compliant retention policies with automated deletion at retention end; automated archiving without data subject deletion capability creates GDPR violation for EU document repositories

SOX APPROVAL CHAIN INTEGRITY: Automated AP workflow routing must maintain segregation of duties — requestor cannot be approver; automated approval chain with SOX violations creates internal control deficiency and audit finding
HIPAA BAA for healthcare documents: DocuWare healthcare deployments with PHI require Ricoh/DocuWare HIPAA BAA; automated PHI archiving without BAA creates HIPAA violation

ERP integration sync timing: Automated DocuWare-to-ERP (SAP, Dynamics) document sync has processing latency; automated workflows that assume immediate ERP reflection of indexed documents must account for sync delay

Document version control: Automated document update workflows must use DocuWare version control correctly; overwriting original documents without version preservation destroys document history and creates audit trail gaps

Retention policy automation conflicts: Automated document deletion triggered by retention schedule must be validated against legal hold requirements; automated deletion of documents under legal hold creates evidence spoliation risk
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise content management. SOC2, GDPR, ISO27001. API key/OAuth2. EU/US. Business documents and workflow data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise content management. SOC2, GDPR, ISO27001. API key/OAuth2. EU/US. Business and compliance documents.
